title: Prompt Management
lede: Centrally store and sync your Claude prompts across devices. Invoke them from any device on the LAN without losing context when you switch computers.
newPromptDesc: Open the Prompt library to record a new prompt.
sendFileDesc: Drop a file to a paired device, 1MB chunks + resumable transfer.
discoverDevicesEmpty: Scan the LAN to find unpaired devices.
emptyPromptDesc: Click "New Prompt" below to record your first one.
